subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from before the Youth unto him who hath traversed the paths of guidance and recognized the Manifestation of God's exalted Self [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی الغلام الی الذی سلک مسالک الهدی و عرف مظهر نفس الله العلی
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution
